## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Mar 30, 2026 - Jul 9, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Antonio Moraes_, Mar 30, 2026, 1/5: "Your AI is awesome! However, there is a bug in the application. When we try to write, the "Send" button disappears, making it unusable. I won't uninstall it, but I will wait for the next update to see how it progresses."
            2. _Nolan Johnson_, Jul 9, 2026, 3/5: "The current version of the app feels slow compared to other providers. The first word of a response loads then the rest is blasted onto the screen all at once."
            3. _Audy Arshavin_, Jul 8, 2026, 5/5: "i think the app has been crashing out and responding slow, the app has been going out and closing without me doing anything and when i opened it, it doesn't load to the chat right away like it used to be before the recent updates, it's even longer and i have to close and open it several times before it finally worked? even though my wifi is great... but other than that the app is quite worth it, it helps me understand and explain in a simple way"
